item.title: CV
item.description: I graduated in Data Science (M.Sc.) at Fernuniversität Hagen, 2026. Philosophy (M.A.) at Ruhr-Universität Bochum, 2024. Mathematics and Philosophy (B.A.) at Ruhr-Universität Bochum, 2022. You can download my full CV as a PDF.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Journal Articles Conference Proceedings Open Access Archives Probing the Limits of the Lie Detector Approach to LLM Deception. https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2603.10003. Download PDF
